song_name: Olivia Rodrigo - So American - Taylor Swift - Wildest Dreams
tuning: E A D G B E
content:

[ch]A[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                                  [ch]A[/ch]

[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
